title: gonocaryum griffithianum
intro: Gonocaryum griffithianum, also known as the Griffith's gonocaryum or Griffith's piper, is a plant species native to the Western Ghats in India. It is a type of flowering plant in the family Piperaceae, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Indian medicine. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Gonocaryum griffithianum can be prepared as a decoction, powder, or oil, and is also used in Ayurvedic herbal preparations to support overall health and well-being.
